nasb.text: You who dwell in Lebanon, Nested in the cedars, How you will groan when pangs come upon you, Pain like a woman in childbirth!

esv.text: O inhabitant of Lebanon, nested among the cedars, how you will be pitied when pangs come upon you, pain as of a woman in labor!”

cnv.text: 住在黎巴嫩，在香柏林中搭窩的啊！ 有痛苦臨到你，像產婦劇痛的時候， 你要怎樣呻吟呢？”

ccb.text: 住在黎巴嫩、安居在香柏木宫殿中的人啊， 当妇人分娩般的痛苦临到你们的时候， 你们将怎样呻吟呢！”
